_comment: KASO Configuration File - Example with all options documented

executorBackends.name: kimi-code
executorBackends._comment: Kimi Code CLI - context-aware backend selection will pick cheapest fitting backend

executorBackends.name: claude-code
executorBackends._comment: Claude Code - higher context window, higher cost

executorBackends.name: codex-local
executorBackends._comment: Codex CLI via npx - example of npm-based backend

_comment_defaultBackend: Which backend to use when context-aware selection isn't triggered
_comment_maxConcurrentAgents: Number or 'auto' (CPU cores - 1). Limits parallel agent execution.
_comment_maxPhaseRetries: Additional retry attempts per phase after initial failure
_comment_defaultPhaseTimeout: Seconds before phase times out (5 minutes default)

contextCapping._comment: Files at end of list removed first when context exceeds backend limit

uiBaseline._comment: Visual regression testing configuration using Playwright

executionStore._comment: Use 'jsonl' for file-based fallback instead of SQLite

webhooks._comment: HMAC-SHA256 signature sent in X-KASO-Signature header when secret configured

mcpServers.name: filesystem
mcpServers._comment: MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers provide tools to executor agents

plugins._comment: npm packages that register custom agents

customPhases.name: security-scan
customPhases._comment: Inject custom phases into the pipeline

sse._comment: Port 0 = auto-assign. SSE server streams real-time execution events

fileWatcher._comment: Auto-detect specs with 'ready-for-dev' status and trigger runs

_comment_logLevel: debug | info | warn | error - controls CLI output verbosity
